drafting_rules: Write results around display-item-backed claims instead of free-floating narrative.
Treat figure and table fact sheets as the minimum evidence contract for claims.
Do not introduce citations into prose unless they are represented in the citation graph.
Use claim packets to draft result prose before polishing section-level narrative.
Use section briefs to decide what each manuscript section should and should not attempt.
Use section drafts as structured scaffolds before any polished narrative rewrite.
Use generated section prose only as editable first-pass text, not as final submission prose.
Apply generated section prose only through managed blocks so freeform author edits remain outside the automated region.
